evidence_text: "She reports recent cross-time-zone travel for work in late December, after which she experienced circadian disruption with perceived worsening of her events, particularly around early morning hours and late afternoons on return. Since I last saw her in October 2016, there has been a clear increase in frequency and functional impact. In January she had a seizure during sleep and three while awake. In Feb she had five in sleep and 3 while awake."
temporal_candidates: No deterministic temporal frequency candidates were extracted from this note.
